category_sources: Official METIS README at https://github.com/KarypisLab/METIS describes graph partitioning and sparse matrix ordering
source_facts.description: Programs that partition graphs and order matrices

tags_sources: Official METIS README describes serial graph partitioning, finite element mesh partitioning, and fill-reducing sparse matrix ordering
